WANDERER-BROKEN_JUZU_RELIC.title: Broken Juzu
WANDERER-BROKEN_JUZU_RELIC.description: On death, [gold]Shift[/gold] ALL cards to [purple]Ofuda[/purple] and apply 5 [gold]Shinigami[/gold].
WANDERER-BROKEN_JUZU_RELIC.flavor: Broken, and with it, so too is your release...
WANDERER-UNSTRUNG_JUZU_RELIC.title: Unstrung Juzu
WANDERER-UNSTRUNG_JUZU_RELIC.description: Replaces [gold]Broken Juzu[/gold]. On death, [gold]Shift[/gold] ALL cards to [purple]Ofuda[/purple] and apply 5 [gold]Shinigami[/gold]. Your [gold]Shinigami[/gold] Max HP is increased by 5.
WANDERER-UNSTRUNG_JUZU_RELIC.flavor: The string has come apart. What was bound now drifts.
